heading: Step 1: Specify the number of documents to skip.
body:
- Select the collection.

- In the Query Bar, click **Options**.

- Enter an integer representing the number of documents to skip
  into the **Skip** field.

  ![Results of using the Skip option](/atlas-ui/images/atlas-ui/querybar/query-skip-success.png)

- Click Find to run the query and view the updated
  results.

  > **Note:** 
  >
  > For query result sets larger than 1000 documents, Atlas shows a
  > subset of the results.  Otherwise, Atlas shows the entire result
  > set.
  >
  > For details on sampling, see [sampling](atlas-ui-sampling).
